mdtools.success_summary: The mdtools run successfully relocated the subsection with dual-scorer agreement.

hybrid.success_summary: The hybrid run completed the relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run timed out while waiting on an LLM completion and returned no file mutations.

gap.rejection_reason: The mdtools seed now passes, so this is no longer lock-blocked, but the family has not completed the required cross-seed stability gate for promotion.

notes: The same normalized task shape can now be solved by both mdtools and hybrid, while unix still fails on timeout.
The prior lock-blocked interpretation was tied to missing subsection relocation support; mdtools now succeeds after `md move-section` is available.
